summary: Frontend now accessible at https://idea-parking.preview.emergentagent.com. Login and Signup screens render correctly with Noshift branding, proper fields, testIDs, and error handling. Auth flow blocked for deeper testing due to: (1) email confirmation required in Supabase (cannot auto-confirm without service_role key), (2) Supabase tables (focuses, profiles, etc.) not yet created - SQL setup at /app/supabase_setup.sql has not been run.

integration_issues.issue: Login with testuser@noshift.app fails with 'Email not confirmed' (Supabase email verification required). Error is displayed correctly in UI but user cannot proceed.
Signup rate limited (429 - 'you can only request this after 40 seconds') when trying to re-register same email. Error displayed correctly in UI.

integration_issues.flow: All authenticated screens (Onboarding, Tabs, Home, Settings)
integration_issues.issue: Cannot test - auth guard redirects to login. Supabase tables don't exist yet (focuses, profiles, parked_ideas, checkins). Both email confirmation and SQL setup needed.

login_screen.details: Noshift branding visible (title, tagline 'Your ideas can wait. Your goal can't.'), email input (testid=login-email-input), password input (testid=login-password-input), Sign In button (testid=login-submit-button), signup link (testid=login-signup-link). Dark theme (#0F0F0F) and amber accent correct.

signup_screen.details: Navigates to /signup from login-signup-link. Email (testid=signup-email-input), Password (testid=signup-password-input), Confirm Password (testid=signup-confirm-input), Create Account button (testid=signup-submit-button), sign-in link (testid=signup-login-link). Error messages display correctly.

action_items: CRITICAL: Run /app/supabase_setup.sql in Supabase SQL editor (https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/duuuhydcmzhyqdsccrkh/sql) to create tables: focuses, profiles, parked_ideas, checkins. Without this, ALL data operations fail.

CRITICAL: Disable email confirmation in Supabase Auth settings (https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/duuuhydcmzhyqdsccrkh/auth/providers) OR use Supabase service_role key to manually confirm testuser@noshift.app. This blocks all authenticated screen testing.
After SQL setup + email disable: Test the full onboarding flow (6 steps), tabs navigation, checkin flow, parking lot, and settings logout.
critical_code_review_comments: settings.tsx: Admin PIN (2847) hardcoded in frontend source - security risk for production
_layout.tsx: checkOnboarding queries focuses table on auth state change; silently fails if table doesn't exist, always routes to onboarding - acceptable for now
Auth guard is working correctly - all non-auth routes redirect to login

success_rate.frontend: 29% (2/7 screens testable - login and signup work; 5 authenticated screens blocked)

seed_data_creation: testuser@noshift.app created in Supabase Auth but email unconfirmed. Supabase tables NOT created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login and signup screens verified working. TWO blockers must be resolved before deeper testing: (1) Run /app/supabase_setup.sql in Supabase dashboard SQL editor, (2) Disable email confirmation in Supabase Auth settings or confirm testuser@noshift.app manually. After these are done, test: login -> onboarding (6 steps: welcome/title/why/criteria/deadline/commit) -> home tab -> ideas/parking lot -> progress -> history -> settings (logout). Admin PIN is 2847, accessible via long press on version text in settings.
